shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
name: Today
detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 2pm and 4pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 80. South wind 6 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
